name: @miraigent/organization-memory-starter
description: Create a safe starter folder structure for organization-owned AI agent memory.

scripts.check: node --check bin/organization-memory-starter.mjs && node --check scripts/check.mjs && node scripts/check.mjs
scripts.test: node scripts/check.mjs && node bin/organization-memory-starter.mjs init .tmp-smoke --force && test -f .tmp-smoke/workspace-shared/MANIFEST.md && test -f .tmp-smoke/workspace-agent-example/AGENTS.md && rm -rf .tmp-smoke
